element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Classes can be changed during progression for diverse combinations
Fluid movement mechanics enable navigation through game world
Player must locate and acquire Keys of Life, Knowledge, and Change
Assuming role of Rapax Templars grants access to Ascension Peak
Journey toward godhood with collected artifacts
Encounter with Dark Savant/Phoonzang; choice-based narrative resolution

typical_relief_triggers: Party composition optimization through class changes
Dialogue and story exposition with key NPCs
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Episodic progression driven by artifact collection goals with escalating difficulty toward endgame choice-based narrative climax

difficulty_curve.early_game: Character creation and formation phase with basic navigation
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Artifact collection quests with increasing complexity; Rapax Temple navigation
difficulty_curve.late_game: Ascension Peak traversal requiring collected artifacts; escalated enemy encounters
notable_spikes: Rapax Temple access requirement (role assumption mechanic)
Cosmic Circle final confrontation with Dark Savant/Phoonzang
Three-way narrative split with different mechanical demands per ending path

notable_level_patterns.description: Repeating cycle of identifying artifact locations, navigating to acquisition zones, and collecting Keys of Life/Knowledge/Change before proceeding to next phase
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Various zones leading to Ascension Peak

notable_level_patterns.description: Rapax Temple serves as gating mechanism requiring specific party role/status assumption before Ascension Peak access granted
Final zone (Cosmic Circle) presents three mutually exclusive choice outcomes (Savant/Pen/Book endings) with different mechanical and thematic consequences
